sources.title: Stop & Shop will close Springfield location, 1 of 32 across ... - NewsBreak
sources.snippet: SPRINGFIELD — Stop & Shop will close its store at 415 Cooley St. by November as part of a regional reorganization eliminating underperforming locations. Its locations at 1600 Boston Road and 1277 Liberty St. in the Springfield Plaza will remain open, the company said in a statement Friday morning. All employees will be offered jobs at other locations, the company said.
